description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage that runs five jobs: code_quality, dependency_scanning, integration, license_management, and sast. Use docker:stable as the image for the security jobs (code_quality, dependency_scanning, license_management, sast) with a docker:stable-dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2; each job should export SP_VERSION (or LICENSE_MANAGEMENT_VERSION) from CI_SERVER_VERSION and run the corresponding registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/* Docker container with appropriate environment variables and mount the repository at /code, then store the JSON report (gl-code-quality-report.json, gl-dependency-scanning-report.json, gl-license-management-report.json, gl-sast-report.json) as an artifact and allow failure. For the integration job, use node:8 image, cache node_modules, run npm install --silent, npm run lint, npm run coverage, and provide MySQL, RabbitMQ (diwakar4/rabbitmq-apifie), and Redis (redis:4-alpine) services; also set a coverage regex and expose the DB_CONNECTION_URI and related variables defined globally. Ensure the pipeline defines global variables for MySQL, RabbitMQ, and Redis connections and no deployment steps are required.
